Sustainability

ESG Reporting for UK SMEs: A Practical Guide

JW
James Wilson·20 September 2025·6 min read

Understanding environmental, social, and governance reporting requirements and opportunities for UK small businesses.

ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance) reporting is becoming increasingly important for UK businesses of all sizes.

Why ESG Matters

  • Investor and stakeholder expectations
  • Regulatory requirements
  • Competitive advantage
  • Talent attraction

Getting Started with ESG

  • Assess material ESG issues
  • Set measurable targets
  • Collect relevant data
  • Report transparently

Common ESG Metrics

Carbon footprint, energy consumption, diversity metrics, and governance practices are commonly reported.

Our Support

We help SMEs develop ESG reporting frameworks aligned with their business goals and stakeholder expectations.

Need Professional Advice?

Our team of qualified accountants and tax advisors can help you implement the strategies discussed in this article.
